more.following_empty: 你的收藏名单中还没有作家。
more.following_hint: 可在艺术家主页将其加入收藏名单。

create_post.placeholder_collapsed: 分享匠人日志、可收藏作品或展览内容。

feed.collector_gate_message: 完成藏家认证后可收藏此作品。
feed.service_tier_care: 此商品含PUMWI Care包装与寄送支持。
feed.service_tier_global: 此商品适用PUMWI Global配送保障，破损100%赔付。

header.title: 操作指南
header.subtitle: Artisan OS 使用手册
header.description: 我们负责运营，让你专注创作。

intro_box.title: 你的工作室大脑
intro_box.description: 控制中心用于处理除实际制作外的所有事务。把它当作真实助理：告诉我们发生了什么、你需要什么或客户提出了什么需求——系统会自动整理为订单、运营日志与客户管理，让你无需繁琐事务也能保持掌控。

orders.title: 订单与库存
orders.subtitle: 流畅的库存管理
orders.description: 快速登记产品并追踪销售，保持库存准确。
orders.example_1: 登记“蓝色陶瓷杯”50件，编号：MUG-001。
orders.example_2: 向 James 售出 2 件 Shadow 外套。

operations.title: 运营日志
operations.subtitle: 你的内部商业日记
operations.description: 将内部备忘、B2B需求与生产提醒与客户咨询区分管理。
operations.example_1: 记录：E-mart 追加订购100个白色杯子。
operations.example_2: 备注：明天去东大门检查布料库存。

marketing.title: 营销
marketing.subtitle: 本地化全球增长
marketing.description: 为 X、Instagram、TikTok 与 Facebook 生成优化内容，支持中、英、日、韩自然本地表达与高效标签。

cs.title: 客户管理
cs.subtitle: 智能客户关系
cs.description: 记录并跟踪客户咨询状态（待处理、等待中、处理中）。
cs.example_1: Mijong 在询问她的 Shadow 外套配送情况。
cs.example_2: James 投诉粉色裤子的缝线问题。

signup.terms_required_error: You must agree to the Terms of Service to sign up.
signup.welcome_redirect: Welcome! Redirecting you to sign in...
signup.email_confirm_body: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click the link in your inbox to complete signup.
signup.resend_error: Failed to resend. Please try again later.

apply.title: 作家申请
apply.page_description: 您可以申请成为PUMWI艺术家。也可在个人资料中申请。
apply.style_label: What is your main craft and artistic style?
apply.style_placeholder: e.g., Hand-stitched leather goods with a vintage look
apply.process_label: Describe your handmade process. Do you use any machinery?
apply.process_placeholder: Tell us how much of your work is done by hand...
apply.scale_label: Do you mass-produce? Please describe your production scale.
apply.scale_placeholder: e.g., Everything is made to order, no mass production.
apply.monthly_label: How many artworks can you typically complete in a month?
apply.log_label: How many times a week can you share your 'Studio Log'?
apply.log_placeholder: e.g., I can update my process 2-3 times a week
apply.city_hint: Enter the city or region where you mainly work.
apply.photos_hint: Upload at least 3 and up to 10 photos of your work. Required.
apply.agreement_text: All applications are carefully reviewed by the PUMWI team.
apply.agreement_required: I have read and agree to the terms above (Required)

error.min_images: Please upload at least 3 representative artwork photos.
error.max_images: You can upload up to 10 representative artwork photos.
error.agree_terms: Please agree to the terms above to submit.
error.fill_questions: Please fill in all five application questions.
error.select_location: Please search and select your activity location.

collector_application.title: 申请成为藏家
collector_application.step1_hint: 请确认您的地址以便验证账户。
collector_application.collector_bio_placeholder: 例：您收藏哪类艺术？看重什么价值？
collector_application.guide_agree_text: 我同意在PUMWI尊重作品与艺术家，理解收藏是对手作艺术价值与作品哲学的承诺。
collector_application.guide_agree_label: 我已阅读并同意社区指南（必填）
collector_application.success_pending: 申请已提交，审核通过后将通知您。

left_panel.title: Why PUMWI
left_panel.subtitle: A platform for artists who create with their best effort and consumers who understand that true value
left_panel.feature1_desc: Only artists who pass PUMWI's rigorous internal screening can showcase their work.
left_panel.feature2_desc: We designed our internal systems around artists so they can focus entirely on creation.
left_panel.feature3_desc: Artists' philosophy and process naturally flow into their work and connect with consumers who understand that value.

founders_letter.title: A Letter from South Korea, with Respect for Your Craft

welcome_popup.title: A Letter from PUMWI Team
welcome_popup.subtitle: Connecting your sincerity to the world

home.sharePlaceholder: 分享匠人日志、可收藏作品或展览内容。

landing.main_description: A platform for artists who create with their best effort and consumers who understand that true value.
landing.hero_subtitle: A platform for artisans who create with soul and collectors who recognize true value.
landing.process_title: How to Apply as a Host
landing.step1_desc: Create an account to get started.
landing.step2_desc: Share your philosophy in the application. We review each submission carefully.
landing.step3_desc: Once approved, you connect with collectors worldwide.
landing.discovery_desc: The impact of offline exhibitions with the convenience of online. Meet verified artists.
landing.sectionA_desc: The impact of offline exhibitions with the convenience of online. Meet verified artists.
landing.sectionB_desc: Every piece has a story. We value the artist's philosophy over specs.
landing.sectionC_desc: Collectors can discover artists nearby and encounter unique works.
landing.trust_desc: Only artists who pass a rigorous review process are allowed to participate.
landing.location_desc: With PUMWI's location technology, consumers discover nearby artisans and artisans connect with peers to share inspiration.
landing.voice_title: Capture Your Art with Your Voice.
landing.voice_desc: Simply describe your work naturally. Our intelligent system refines and structures the details.
landing.voice_section_title: Describe Your Work, Simply by Speaking
landing.voice_section_desc: Writing descriptions should never stand in the way of creation.
landing.voice_flow: Take a photo → Speak → System organizes
landing.voice_description_title: Capture Your Art with Your Voice.
landing.voice_description_body: Free yourself from the burden of writing descriptions. Just speak your thoughts, and we handle the documentation.
landing.os_desc: You focus on creating, we take care of the operations.
landing.philosophy_desc: We value the artist's philosophy over specs.
landing.sectionD_title: Global Connection: Art Begins Around You
landing.global_connection_title: Global Connection: Art Starting Near You
landing.global_connection_desc: Consumers find special pieces from the nearest workshop artists; workshop artists connect with peers across borders.

nearbyArtists.title: Artists Near Me
nearbyArtists.permissionDenied: Allow location to see artists near you.
nearbyArtists.setAddressPrompt: Please set your location to see nearby artists.

loginPage.hero_tagline: 遇见经 PUMWI 严选的韩国顶尖工坊作家。
loginPage.quota_text:
严格配额制。每个地区仅有极少数
能成为PUMWI手工坊作家。
loginPage.founder_title:
用脚步丈量，以双手验证。
由创始人亲自邀请的手工坊作家名单。
loginPage.founder_desc: PUMWI不依赖数据或算法。创始人亲赴现场，严格验证每位手工坊作家的理念与创作过程，仅介绍通过严格标准的当地真正匠人。
loginPage.section1_desc: Offline exhibitions meet online convenience. Discover verified artists worldwide.
loginPage.section2_desc: Every artwork has a story. Check the artist's bio, exhibition history, and peer recommendations before you buy.
loginPage.section3_desc: Only artists who pass our 5-step screening can join. The community and our team uphold quality together.
loginPage.section4_desc: Inventory, system marketing, and CS Master. We handle the business so you can focus on creation.

concierge.hero_headline: 遇见经 PUMWI 严选的韩国顶尖工坊作家。
